html:
2026-0659
2026-06-22PS, EMCREmergency Management ActProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 299, ManitobaProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 299 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Manitoba with respect to the interface fires that occurred in Manitoba, from April to August 2025.N/A
subject: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 299, Manitoba
precis: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 299 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Manitoba with respect to the interface fires that occurred in Manitoba, from April to August 2025.
